student1.name: Zhang Ming
student1.content: My learning experience at SIU completely transformed my career trajectory. The course content is closely integrated with industry practices, and the professors have rich practical experience. After graduation, I immediately secured a job opportunity at an international company.

student2.name: Li Ting
student2.content: As an international student, I experienced unparalleled support and inclusivity at SIU. The flexible learning approach allowed me to balance family and studies while making friends from around the world.

aboutPage.title: About Stratford International University
aboutPage.subtitle: Forging ahead, shaping the future. We are a prestigious institution dedicated to providing high-quality global education.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Cultivating Future Leaders with a Global Perspective
mission.description1: Stratford International University was established in 1995. For the past three decades, we have been committed to providing exceptional educational experiences, fostering students' global vision and professional skills, and preparing them for success on the global stage.
mission.description2: As an international university, we have established close collaborative relationships with top universities across many countries and regions worldwide. We provide students with extensive learning opportunities and rich cultural experiences. Our curriculum is designed and taught by industry experts and academic leaders, ensuring the highest standards of education.

advantages.label: Our Advantages
advantages.title: Why Choose Stratford International University
advantages.subtitle: We provide multiple advantages to ensure students receive the best learning experience and career development opportunities.

globalRecognition.title: Global Recognition
globalRecognition.description: Our certificates and degrees are recognized in many countries and regions worldwide, providing unlimited possibilities for your future career. Wherever you are in the world, our qualifications will open the door to success for you.

excellence.title: Educational Excellence
excellence.description: Our courses are designed and taught by industry experts and academic leaders, combining practical experience and theoretical knowledge to ensure you receive the highest quality educational experience and practical professional skills.

network.title: Global Network
network.description: Join our global alumni network to connect with professionals from different countries and industries, expanding your career opportunities and connections.

security.title: Secure Certification
security.description: Our certificates use blockchain technology to ensure their authenticity and security, which can be verified online at any time, providing reliable protection for your academic credentials.

campus.title: Modern Campus
campus.description: Our campus is equipped with advanced teaching facilities and technology, providing students with a comfortable, modern learning environment that supports various academic activities and research projects.

support.title: Personalized Support
support.description: We provide comprehensive student support services, including academic guidance, career planning, and personal development, ensuring that each student can fully realize their potential and achieve their goals.

history.label: Our History
history.title: Pioneering the Path of Global Education Excellence
history.subtitle: Looking back at our development journey from 1995, witness our continuous pursuit of educational excellence.

phase1.title: Founding Phase (1995-2000)
phase1.description: Stratford International University was founded in 1995, initially offering only a few business and management courses. Under the visionary leadership of the founders, the university quickly established a good academic reputation.

phase2.title: Development & Growth (2001-2010)
phase2.description: During this period, the university significantly expanded its course offerings, adding programs in technology, health, and humanities. At the same time, the first batch of international partnerships were established, taking the first step towards globalization.

phase3.title: Global Expansion (2011-2020)
phase3.description: During these ten years, we established branch campuses and learning centers in multiple countries, greatly enhancing our international influence. Our graduates began to hold important positions in leading institutions and companies around the world.

phase4.title: Digital Innovation (2021-Present)
phase4.description: In recent years, we have heavily invested in educational technology and digital innovation, launching an online learning platform and applying blockchain technology to our certificate verification system. We are working with global leading companies to provide students with more practical learning opportunities.

contact.title: Want to learn more about us?
contact.subtitle: Whether you want to apply for our courses or have any questions about our university, our team is ready to assist you. Please contact us through the following methods, and we will reply as soon as possible.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Whether you have questions or need assistance, our team is ready to support you.

coursesPage.title: Our Courses
coursesPage.subtitle: Explore our world-class academic programs designed to pave the way for your future

mba.title: Master of Business Administration (MBA)
mba.description: Our MBA program develops global business leaders through case studies, industry internships, and multicultural teamwork, providing the professional skills and strategic thinking needed for modern business management.

ai.title: Master of Artificial Intelligence & Data Science
ai.description: This program focuses on developing professionals in the fields of AI and data science. Students will learn machine learning algorithms, deep learning, natural language processing, and data analysis, preparing for thriving careers in technology.

health.title: Master of Global Health Management
health.description: This program addresses global health challenges and healthcare system management, preparing students to take leadership roles in international healthcare organizations, public health agencies, and health policy making.

finance.title: Master of International Finance
finance.description: This program develops financial experts with specialized knowledge of global financial markets, covering investment management, risk analysis, corporate finance, and financial technology, preparing for international finance careers.

environment.title: Master of Sustainable Development & Environmental Management
environment.description: This program addresses global challenges in environmental protection and sustainable development, developing students' expertise in climate change, resource management, and environmental policy to contribute to a more sustainable future.

culture.title: Bachelor of Arts in Cross-Cultural Communication
culture.description: This program develops talents with global vision and cross-cultural communication skills. Students learn about different cultural traditions, language learning methods, international relations, and social changes in the context of globalization, preparing to become true global citizens.
